languages.text: "Элантах, не поддавайся бездумной тяге к разрушению, свойственной твоему виду. Я могу научить твоих слуг многому, и они будут исчезать из зоны-приманки задолго до того, как там окажется одна из Погонщиц. Это отточит их навыки и сохранит мир невредимым".

"Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."
languages.original_text: "Элантах, не поддавайся бездумной тяге к разрушению, свойственной твоему виду. Я могу научить твоих слуг многому, и они будут исчезать из зоны-приманки задолго до того, как там окажется одна из Погонщиц. Это отточит их навыки и сохранит мир невредимым".

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

"Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

"Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

languages.text: 「エランタチ、あなたの種族に宿る破壊への無意識の衝動に屈すなかれ。私はあなたのしもべに多くのことを教えることができる。そして、彼らは、ドルーバーの一匹が現れるずっと前に、誘い餌の区域から姿を消すだろう。そうすることで、彼らのスキルが磨かれ、世界は完結するだろう」
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

traits.locale_text: 「エランタチ、あなたの種族に宿る破壊への無意識の衝動に屈すなかれ。私はあなたのしもべに多くのことを教えることができる。そして、彼らは、ドルーバーの一人が現れるずっと前に、誘い餌の区域から姿を消すだろう。そうすることで、彼らのスキルが磨かれ、世界は完結するだろう。」

languages.text: «Elantach, no sucumbas a los impulsos desenfrenados de destrucción que padece tu especie. Puedo enseñar a tus sirvientes muchas cosas, y desaparecerán de la zona de atracción mucho antes de que aparezca uno de los Pastores. Refinaré sus capacidades sin poner en peligro al mundo».
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

traits.locale_text: «Elantach, no sucumbas a los impulsos desenfrenados de destrucción que padece tu especie. Puedo enseñar a tus sirvientes muchas cosas, y desaparecerán de la zona de atracción mucho antes de que aparezca uno de los Pastores. Refinaré sus capacidades sin poner en peligro al mundo».

languages.text: “外界人，不要屈从于你族类固有的盲目毁灭欲。我可以教导你的仆从，让他们能在拒生花现身前早早撤离诱饵区。这既能磨炼他们的技艺，同时也能保全这个世界。”
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

traits.locale_text: “外界人，不要屈从于你族类固有的盲目毁灭欲。我可以教导你的仆从，让他们能在拒生花现身前早早撤离诱饵区。这既能磨炼他们的技艺，同时也能保全这个世界。”

languages.text: "Elantach, gebt nicht dem gedankenlosen Drang nach Zerstörung nach, der Eurer Spezies innewohnt. Ich kann Eure Diener viele Dinge lehren, und sie werden lange vor der Ankunft der Treiber aus der Köderzone verschwunden sein. Das wird ihre Fähigkeiten schärfen und die Welt erhalten."
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, gebt nicht dem gedankenlosen Drang nach Zerstörung nach, der Eurer Spezies innewohnt. Ich kann Eure Diener viele Dinge lehren, und sie werden lange vor der Ankunft der Treiber aus der Köderzone verschwunden sein. Das wird ihre Fähigkeiten schärfen und die Welt erhalten."

languages.text: "Elantach, türüne özgü o düşüncesiz yok etme dürtüsüne boyun eğme. Hizmetkârlarına pek çok şey öğretebilirim, Çobanlardan biri ortaya çıkmadan çok önce yemleme bölgesinden kaybolurlar. Bu, onların becerilerini geliştirir ve dünyayı olduğu gibi korur."
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."

traits.locale_text: "Elantach, türüne özgü o düşüncesiz yok etme dürtüsüne boyun eğme. Hizmetkârlarına pek çok şey öğretebilirim, Çobanlardan biri ortaya çıkmadan çok önce yemleme bölgesinden kaybolurlar. Bu, onların becerilerini geliştirir ve dünyayı olduğu gibi korur."

languages.text: « Elantach, ne succombez pas à la folie destructrice et aveugle qui caractérise les vôtres. Je peux enseigner une ou deux choses à vos serviteurs, et ils disparaîtront de la zone visée bien avant que les Chasseurs ne mordent à l'hameçon. Cela leur permettrait d'affûter leurs capacités tout en préservant la planète. »
languages.original_text: "Elantach, do not succumb to the mindless drive toward destruction inherent to your kind. I can teach your servants many things, and they will disappear from the baiting zone long before one of the Drovers appears. This will hone their skills and keep the world intact."
